'''Yin Metal Rooster''' is the 58th of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 辛 Kanoto (yin metal, the luna-aligned face of occultation), and its branch is 酉 Tori, the [[Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, both stem and branch share the metal element, doubling its weight in this node.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yang Metal Monkey]] (node 57) and [[Yang Water Dog]] (node 59).

== Folk reading ==
Yin Metal Rooster anchors the cycle's longest prophecy. Every twenty-one returns of this node — once in 1,260 years — a true revolution overturns the ruling order. Together with Yang Metal Monkey it bookends the metal-and-cold pair that priests historically mark with reign-title changes.

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Kanoto (辛)]] — yin metal
* '''Branch:''' [[Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] — yin metal
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Luna]]
* '''Element-season:''' occultation

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yang Metal Monkey]] — preceding node
* [[Yang Water Dog]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q904743}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
